case_title: TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION VS. ANDY Z NG ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-10-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NG, ANDY Z DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-22-2019
